title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Reiju, Sanji, Vinsmoke Family as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as you don't run away, everything'll turn out just peachy, Sanji :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At tomorrow's wedding CER- Emony, the Vinsmoke family

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Something just fell down from the sky!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 15 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
